item.title: AWS CloudFormation
item.description: Questions What is stack sets? How do you deploy cross-region cross-account? How do you customize parameter values for different regions and/or accounts? What is termination protection? What is deletion policy attribute? What resources support it? What are the valid vales? Snapshot/retain What is a stack policy? What is the use-case? What is a change-set? can use ssm appconfig? can use ssm parameter store? cloudformation does not support creating secrets parameter, supply parameter values in a separate file, like terraform tfvars files parameter types update behaviour How does it work with aws cdk?
